mapper.sql: ttej.employee_id, ttej.dept_id, ttej.enabled_flag, ttej.attribute3, ttej.attribute1, ttej.id, ttej.attribute2, ttej.create_time, ttej.create_by, ttej.update_time, ttej.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into td_train_employee_jurisdiction (employee_id, dept_id, enabled_flag, attribute3, attribute1, attribute2, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_train_employee_jurisdiction set employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select dept_id from td_train_employee_jurisdiction ttej where ttej.employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ttej.enabled_flag = 1
